title: Internal error in V3DfgPeephole on out-of-range
body:
Verilator version I'm using:
```
./bin/verilator --version                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
Verilator 5.029 devel rev v5.028-1-g48776277b
```

Test case:
```sv
module full_adder (output cout);
endmodule

module serial_adder #(WIDTH=8) (
        input  cin,
        output cout);

    wire [WIDTH:0] c;

    generate for (genvar i = 0; i < WIDTH; i++)
        full_adder fa(c[i+1]);
    endgenerate

    assign c[0] = cin;
    assign cout = c[WIDTH+1]; // intentional out-of-range

endmodule
```
 passing it to `./bin/verilator --lint-only --top-module serial_adder --debug warn_err_example.sv` results in
 ```
 ...
 - V3Const.cpp:3928:   constifyAllLint: 
%Warning-SELRANGE: warn_err.sv:15:20: Selection index out of range: 9:9 outside 8:0
                                    : ... note: In instance 'serial_adder'
-node: SEL 0x5555562a52a0 <e2573> {d15au} @dt=0x555556273d10@(G/w1) decl[8:0]]
   15 |     assign cout = c[WIDTH+1];  
      |                    ^
                   ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/SELRANGE?v=5.027
                   ... Use "/* verilator lint_off SELRANGE */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
- V3Const.cpp:1434:       Related Raw index is 9:9
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_018_const.tree
- V3SplitVar.cpp:1239:splitVariable: 
- V3Inst.cpp:618:     dearrayAll: 
- V3LinkDot.cpp:4060: linkDotArrayed: 
- V3Begin.cpp:367:    debeginAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_023_begin.tree
- V3Tristate.cpp:1834:tristateAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_024_tristate.tree
- V3Unknown.cpp:530:  unknownAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_025_unknown.tree
- V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:233:extract: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_026_dfg-extract.tree
- V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:240:optimize: 
%Error: Internal Error: warn_err.sv:1:27: ../V3DfgPeephole.cpp:753: OOPS
    1 | module full_adder (output cout);
      |                           ^~~~
- V3Ast.cpp:1323:     Dumping obj_dir/Vserial_adder_990_final.tree
...
```

Interestingly:
- removing `genfor` with `full_adder` instantiation gets rids of internal error (only `SELRANGE` warning persists):
```sv
module full_adder (output cout);
endmodule

module serial_adder #(WIDTH=8) (
        input  cin,
        output cout);

    wire [WIDTH:0] c;

    assign c[0] = cin;
    assign cout = c[WIDTH+1]; // intentional out-of-range

endmodule
```


- correcting out-of-range selection gets rids of both internal error and `SELRANGE` warn:
```sv
module full_adder (output cout);
endmodule

module serial_adder #(WIDTH=8) (
        input  cin,
        output cout);

    wire [WIDTH:0] c;

    generate for (genvar i = 0; i < WIDTH; i++)
        full_adder fa(c[i+1]);
    endgenerate

    assign c[0] = cin;
    assign cout = c[WIDTH];

endmodule
```

I think there was similar issue in the past: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5159 (closed as fixed).
